---
title: "Jack Katz"
about:
  template: jolla  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jack-katz-0199771b8/ 
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://instagram.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://GITHUB_USERNAME.github.io/resume-example.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:YOUR_EMAIL@geneseo.edu
---

Jack Katz majors in Economics at SUNY Geneseo. When not working on data analytics, Finley enjoys spending time unicycling and playing with her pet iguana.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo \| Geneseo, NY <br> B.S. in Data Analytics \| Aug 2020 - May 2024 <br> Major in Business Administration

## Experience

Starbucks Analytics \| Data Analyst Intern \| May 2024 - Aug 2024
